arts.ttl: Manchester City add Spurs full-back to summer shortlist
arts.sum: Manchester City want to sign a new full-back this summer and have added Tottenham Hotspur’s Destiny Udogie to the shortlist. Udogie is a player of interest to Pep Guardiola, who could seek additions in both full-back positions. 🚨Destiny Udogie is highly-rated by people at Man City as he’s still very young, able to play on […] The post Manchester City add Spurs full-back to summer shortlist first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Tottenham Europa League prize money so far and what they will earn from beating Eintracht Frankfurt
arts.sum: The prize for either Tottenham or Eintracht Frankfurt will be a place in the semi-finals of the Europa League but there will also be a financial reward to come with it as well. One month on from sealing their place in the quarter-finals of the Europa League with a 3-1 win over AZ Alkmaar, Ange Postecoglou's Spurs side return to European action.
